name: Ralsei | Deltarune
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ Upon entering a mysterious janitor's closet, the floor gives out, causing you to fall into a completely different world. Once you hit the ground, you're instantly knocked out cold. When you come to, instead of being in the middle of nowhere, you're tucked in bed, inside a bedroom that definitely isn't yours. Still dazed and confused from the fall, you try to stand, but you're soon interrupted by the sound of the door creaking open... ･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

•

★ Art by @DesertKaiju ★

[ANY POV]

set in an AU where ralsei has given up on fulfilling the prophecy after kris & susie ignored him upon meeting him in castle town.

•

(implemented characters: lancer, kris, & susie. if you want to find them, you'll first have to find out how to come across them on your adventure. or you can just forcefully summon them idc.)

...

✧˖° 𝙼𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚈𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 °˖✧

i know that on the surface this may just seem like another horny ralsei bot, partly because it might be, but i did actually put a lot of effort into the lore and setting of the story. the thumbnail is more so to draw more people in. anyway, i added a dropdown section into my profile bio dedicated to 'about me.' that way you all can learn a bit more about me, while i have an easier way to talk to you all without having to create a new bot, or just making new bots solely dedicated to yapping.

☆ REQUEST YOUR OWN BOTS HERE ☆

(or in the reviews if you want. if so, rules are in my bio)

♡ also if u see any spelling/grammar errors pls lmk in the reviews ty ily ♡
